result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Pricebook2 pb ON o.Pricebook2Id = pb.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;': no such table: sales_pipeline.Contract"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Pricebook2 pb ON o.Pricebook2Id = pb.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Pricebook2 pb ON o.Pricebook2Id = pb.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25')
  AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
